mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, fk_post_id AS postId, fk_memberid AS memberId, content, fk_parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM tbl_comment WHERE fk_post_id = #{postId} AND fk_parent_comment_id IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, fk_post_id AS postId, fk_memberid AS memberId, content, fk_parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM tbl_comment WHERE fk_parent_comment_id = #{parentCommentId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_comment ( comment_id, fk_post_id, fk_memberid, content, fk_parent_comment_id, status, created_at ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(comment_id), 0) + 1 FROM tbl_comment), #{postId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, #{parentCommentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comment WHERE fk_post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
SELECT post_id AS postId, title FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id = ( SELECT MAX(post_id) FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id < #{postId} AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 )
SELECT post_id AS postId, title FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id = ( SELECT MIN(post_id) FROM tbl_post WHERE post_id > #{postId} AND post_status = 'ACTIVE' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
